title: lippia oxyphyllaria
intro: Lippia oxyphyllaria, also known as the Sweet Mexican tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Lippia oxyphyllaria have been reported to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, while also exhibiting antiviral and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Lippia oxyphyllaria is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
